documentTitle: Logged In Successfully | Practice Test Automation

issues.message: This button element does not have a name available to an accessibility API. Valid names are: title , element content, aria-label , aria-labelledby .
Heading markup should be used if this content is intended as a heading.
Check that this element has an inherited background colour or image to complement the corresponding inline foreground colour.
issues.context: Log out
issues.selector: #loop-container > div > article > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > div > a

issues.message: This element is absolutely positioned and the background color can not be determined. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and all covered parts of the background are at least 4.5:1.
This element is absolutely positioned and the background color can not be determined. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and all covered parts of the background are at least 4.5:1.
This element is absolutely positioned and the background color can not be determined. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and all covered parts of the background are at least 4.5:1.
Img element is marked so that it is ignored by Assistive Technology.
Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/landmark-unique?application=axeAPI)

runnerExtras.help: Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination

issues.message: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/color-contrast?application=axeAPI)

runnerExtras.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
runnerExtras.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
